data.title: Federal Reserve Governor Highlights Labor Market Vulnerabilities
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve Governor Michelle Bowman has expressed concerns about the labor market, noting it is more fragile than anticipated. Bowman emphasized the need to shift focus from inflation to employment, suggesting that current economic conditions warrant increased attention to job stability.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Balance Sheet Focuses on Reserve Levels
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve official Schmid stated that a key issue for the Federal Reserve's balance sheet is determining the appropriate level of reserves. It is anticipated that reserves could decrease to approximately $2.6 trillion.

data.title: A whale address received over 54.08 million XPL, worth approximately $40.56 million
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi's monitoring, the whale address (0 x 790...1023) that had pledged 50 million USDC and 2.7 million USDT on Plasma received 54,081,783.66 XPL, worth approximately US$40.56 million.

data.title: Gate has launched Plasma (XPL) spot trading, with Launchpad subscription yields reaching 126.77%.
data.description: According to official news, Gate launched Plasma (XPL) spot trading at 21:00 (UTC+8) on September 25th. The price opened at $0.7937 and is currently trading at $0.7525. It is reported that the highest yield from the previously concluded Gate Launchpad event reached 126.77%.

data.title: Bybit has launched Plasma (XPL) on the spot market, along with a 9,000,000 XPL prize pool.
data.description: According to official news, Bybit has officially listed Plasma (XPL) on the spot market, launching a 9,000,000 XPL Token Splash prize pool for new and existing users. In conjunction with the spot listing, Bybit's wealth management platform is also launching a regular $XPL staking program, offering an annualized yield of up to 400%. According to the official announcement, subscriptions for this wealth management product will open at 1:30 PM UTC on September 25th. Users can enjoy high returns and flexible allocation while investing in XPL. Plasma is a high-performance Layer 1 blockchain designed for global stablecoin payments. It supports zero-fee USD₮ transfers, custom gas tokens, confidential payments, and possesses the high throughput required for global scalability.

data.title: Pop Culture Plans to Expand Bitcoin Holdings for Crypto Fund
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. publicly traded company Pop Culture has announced plans to acquire an additional 1,000 Bitcoins over the next year. This move is part of their strategy to establish the "Crypto Pop Fund," a digital trend fund valued at $100 million. Last week, the company revealed that it had already invested $33 million to purchase 300 Bitcoins.

data.title: A trader lost over $45.3 million on Hyperliquid in 40 days
data.description: According to Lookonchain, trader 0xa523 lost over $45.3 million on Hyperliquid over a 40-day period, becoming the platform’s largest loser. The trader has since withdrawn his remaining $450,000 in funds.

data.title: Bitget Launchpool project XPL is now open for investment. Locking BGB or XPL will unlock 2.2 million XPL.
data.description: Bitget's current Launchpool project, Plasma (XPL), is now open for staking. Locking BGB and XPL will unlock 2,200,000 XPL. This round of Launchpool has two lock-up pools: BGB Lock-up Pool Airdrop Total: 2,075,000 XPL; VIP User Lock-up Cap: 50,000 BGB; Regular User Lock-up Cap: 5,000 BGB; XPL Lock-up Pool Airdrop Total: 125,000 XPL; Individual Lock-up Cap: 1,250,000 XPL.

data.title: Binance CEO Richard met with Vietnamese Deputy Prime Minister Nguyen Hoa Binh
data.description: Binance CEO Richard Teng met with Vietnamese Deputy Prime Minister Nguyen Hoa Binh in the United Arab Emirates. The two sides had in-depth discussions on the development of blockchain and digital assets, a key component of Vietnam's plan to build an international financial center. Deputy Prime Minister Nguyen Hoa Binh expressed his desire to collaborate with leading industry players to promote the development of the crypto industry. During the meeting, Deputy Prime Minister Nguyen Hoa Binh invited Richard to serve as a senior advisor on the construction and development of the Vietnam International Financial Center, providing professional support for its planning and construction. Richard Teng responded positively, stating that Binance is willing to share experiences, explore collaborative opportunities, and work with Vietnam to promote the long-term development of the digital economy and crypto market.

data.description: OKX market data shows that BTC has fallen below 111,000 USDT, currently trading at 110,982.7 USDT, a 24-hour drop of 1.87%. (This newsletter was generated with AI assistance.)

data.title: Tuttle Capital Launches Innovative ETF with Zero-Day Expiry Strategy
data.description: According to PANews, Tuttle Capital has introduced the IBIT 0 DTE Covered Call ETF (BITK), marking the first exchange-traded fund based on BlackRock's IBIT with a zero-day expiry covered call options strategy. This development represents a significant advancement in ETF offerings, providing investors with new opportunities in the financial markets.

data.description: HyperionDeFi (NASDAQ: HYPD) announced today that it has purchased an additional 176,422 HYPE tokens, expanding its total holdings to 1,712,195 HYPE tokens at an average purchase price of $38.25 per token.

data.description: The yield spread between 5-year and 30-year U.S. Treasury bonds fell below 100 basis points for the first time since August 11.

data.title: An address spent $873,000 to buy 1.004 million XPL and deposited it into Binance
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi's monitoring, a certain address spent US$873,000 to buy 1.004 million XPL on the BSC network in the past 50 minutes, with an average price of US$0.9691, and has now made a floating profit of US$80,000; 2 minutes ago, he had recharged all the tokens into Binance.

data.title: OKX Launches Plasma Bonus Campaign with a Total Prize Pool of 650,000 XPL Tokens
data.description: OKX has officially launched its "Plasma Trading to Earn Coins" promotion, offering a total prize pool of 650,000 XPL tokens. From 8:00 PM on September 15, 2025, to 8:00 AM on October 19, 2025 (UTC+8), users can unlock generous rewards by depositing XPL into their OKX accounts and trading it, or by participating in trading competitions. There are three ways to participate: new users can receive 20 XPL by completing designated tasks; and users can receive 25 XPL by successfully inviting friends to register and complete tasks, with a maximum of five friends eligible to receive referral rewards. Additionally, users with the highest trading volume in BTC, ETH, SOL, ENA, and XPL during the promotion period will receive additional XPL.

data.title: U.S. jobless claims fall, but labor demand remains weak and unemployment rises to a four-year high
data.description: The number of initial jobless claims in the United States fell last week, but the job market lost its luster due to sluggish hiring. The U.S. Department of Labor reported Thursday that initial claims fell by 14,000 to a seasonally adjusted 218,000 in the week ending September 20. Despite hoarding workers, businesses remain reluctant to increase payrolls in response to uncertainty caused by protectionist trade policies. These policies have raised average U.S. tariffs to their highest level in a century. Weak labor demand has weakened the labor market's resilience, prompting the Federal Reserve to cut interest rates again last week. The Trump administration's crackdown on immigration has also reduced the labor supply and curbed job growth. Initial jobless claims showed that continuing claims fell by 2,000 to a seasonally adjusted 1.926 million in the week ending September 13. The average length of unemployment rose from 24.1 weeks in August to 24.5 weeks, the longest since April 2022, and the unemployment rate rose to a nearly four-year high of 4.3%. (Jinshi)

data.description: According to REX Shares, the REX-Osprey Ethereum + Staking ETF (ESK) has now begun trading. The ETF provides investors with exposure to Ethereum spot trading, combined with real on-chain staking rewards, and seeks to provide monthly distributions.

data.title: Whale's Plasma Staking Yields Significant Returns
data.description: According to PANews, on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa has reported that a major whale or institution initially staked 50 million USDC in Plasma this June. The address, identified as 0x790...41023, added an additional 2.7 million USDT to its stake two months ago. As a result, the address has acquired 54,081,783.66 XPL, which is currently valued at approximately $40.56 million.

data.title: Federal Reserve's October Rate Cut Probability Decreases
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from CME's "FedWatch" indicates that following the release of U.S. initial jobless claims and other economic data, the probability of a 25 basis point rate cut by the Federal Reserve in October has decreased to 83.4%, down from 91.9% the previous day. Meanwhile, the likelihood of maintaining the current interest rate has risen to 16.6%.

Earlier reports highlighted that the number of initial jobless claims in the U.S. for the week ending September 20 was 218,000, marking a new low since the week ending July 19, 2025, and below the expected 235,000. Additionally, the final annualized quarterly rate for the U.S. core PCE price index in the second quarter was 2.6%, slightly above the anticipated 2.5%. Furthermore, the final annualized quarterly rate for the U.S. real GDP in the second quarter was 3.8%, surpassing the expected 3.30%.
